meta.notes: Tokens extracted from browser inspection and computed styles. NexaRegular font replaced with Open Sans (Google Fonts) as proposed alternative.

primary.source: observed via browser inspection — dropdown links, active nav states
primary.usage: primary CTA buttons, active nav, link hover states, dropdown links

primary_dark.source: [PROPOSED — not in audit] Darkened primary by 15% for hover states
primary_dark.usage: hover state for primary buttons and links

surface.usage: subtle background sections, card hover states

text_primary.source: observed — body text from computed styles

text_muted.usage: disabled text, placeholder text, tertiary information

text_disabled.source: observed — light gray for disabled states

text_inverse.source: observed — hero heading text, button text on dark backgrounds
text_inverse.usage: text on dark backgrounds, hero overlays

success.source: [PROPOSED — not in audit] Standard success green for form validation

error.source: [PROPOSED — not in audit] Standard error red for form validation

font_display.source: [PROPOSED — not in audit] Replacing NexaRegular (unavailable custom font) with Open Sans from observed fallback stack
font_display.reasoning: NexaRegular is custom/licensed font. Open Sans is in MAXHUB's fallback stack and provides similar geometric sans-serif appearance.

font_body.source: [PROPOSED — not in audit] Same as display for consistency

xs.source: [PROPOSED — not in audit] Scaled down from observed 14px base

sm.source: observed — body font size from computed styles

base.source: [PROPOSED — not in audit] Standard web base size

lg.source: [PROPOSED — not in audit] Intermediate scale step

xl.source: [PROPOSED — not in audit] Intermediate scale step

2xl.source: [PROPOSED — not in audit] Intermediate scale step

3xl.source: [PROPOSED — not in audit] Intermediate scale step

4xl.source: observed — H2 font size from computed styles

5xl.source: observed — H1 font size from computed styles (hero headings)

6xl.source: [PROPOSED — not in audit] Larger display size for special headers

weights.source: observed — H1 weight 400, H2 weight 400, body normal. Added 600/700 for emphasis.

spacing.source: [PROPOSED — not in audit] Standard 8px base for Tailwind-compatible scale

scale.note: Custom margin utilities .mb-h3, .mb-h5, .mb-h6 observed in audit — exact pixel values not extracted. Using standard Tailwind scale.

container_max_width.source: [PROPOSED — not in audit] Standard desktop max-width. Audit noted 'max-width: none' but visual observation shows centered container around 1280px.

container_padding.source: observed — container padding from computed styles: '0px 15px'

ghost.source: observed — Contact Sales button padding from computed styles

none.source: observed — primary buttons have border-radius: 0px (sharp corners)

md.source: [PROPOSED — not in audit] Card corners appear rounded (visual observation, likely 4-8px range)

lg.source: [PROPOSED — not in audit] Larger radius for special elements

full.source: [PROPOSED — not in audit] Full rounding for pills, badges

sm.source: [PROPOSED — not in audit] Subtle shadow for cards (visual observation noted shadows, exact values not extracted)

md.source: [PROPOSED — not in audit] Medium shadow for elevated cards

lg.source: [PROPOSED — not in audit] Large shadow for modals, dropdowns

shadows.note: Audit observed subtle shadows on product cards but exact CSS values not extracted

breakpoints.source: [PROPOSED — not in audit] Standard Tailwind breakpoints. CLAUDE.md specifies responsive breakpoints: 320 / 768 / 1024 / 1440.

text.implementation: requires browser verification for exact animation properties
